notable_excerpts: Our renewable energy has gone up by 13% to almost 45%.
We have had a reduction in the water consumption in most of our plants.
The women factory workforce has gone up to 45% by 1%.
Our Britannia Nutrition Foundation beneficiaries are up by 22% to almost 300,000.
We have also got a certain recognition with the Golden Peacock Awards.
Our scores on the S&P Global have gone up to 60%.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted significant improvements in renewable energy usage and water consumption reduction, indicating strong environmental efforts. Social initiatives focused on increasing the women workforce and community nutrition, showing positive social impact. Governance mentions were limited to awards and recognition, with less emphasis on structural governance practices.
